# AAA Auto Glass — Auckland Windscreen Replacement

## Overview
AAA Auto Glass is Auckland's trusted auto glass specialist, established in 1989 with over 37 years of experience. The business operates from 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072, and provides fully mobile windscreen replacement and auto glass repair across all of Greater Auckland.

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** 0800 757-985
- **Email:** tiptopautonz@hotmail.com
- **Address:** 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072
- **Hours:** 7am – 11pm, 7 days a week
- **Website:** https://aaaautoglass.co.nz/
- **WhatsApp:** +64 21 757 985

## Services
1. **Windscreen Replacement** — Full windscreen replacement for all makes and models, including ADAS-equipped vehicles. Mobile service available.
2. **ADAS Windscreen Replacement** — Specialist fitting for vehicles with ADAS cameras, rain sensors, HUD, and heated windscreens. Camera housing and sensor positioning ensured.
3. **Side & Rear Glass Replacement** — Door windows, quarter glass, rear windscreens, and tailgate glass for cars, utes, and vans.
4. **Sunroof & Roof Glass Replacement** — Standard sunroof panels and full panoramic roof systems, including Tesla roof glass.
5. **Chip & Crack Repair** — Resin injection repair for chips and small cracks under 50mm.

## Service Areas — Mobile Coverage
AAA Auto Glass provides same-day mobile service across all of Greater Auckland:
- **North Shore** — Takapuna, Albany, Milford, Glenfield, Devonport, Birkenhead, Beach Haven, Birkdale, Browns Bay, Mairangi Bay, Torbay, Long Bay, and all surrounding suburbs.
- **East Auckland** — Howick, Botany, Pakuranga, Bucklands Beach, Half Moon Bay, Highland Park, Beachlands, Whitford, and all surrounding suburbs.
- **South Auckland** — Manukau, Manurewa, Papakura, Papatoetoe, Flat Bush, Takanini, Otahuhu, Mangere, Drury, and all surrounding suburbs including Auckland Airport area.
- **West Auckland** — Henderson, New Lynn, Massey, Te Atatu, Glen Eden, Titirangi, Westgate, Avondale, Blockhouse Bay, Hobsonville, and all surrounding suburbs.
- **Central Auckland** — Auckland CBD, Newmarket, Parnell, Remuera, Mt Eden, Mt Albert, Ponsonby, Grey Lynn, Epsom, Ellerslie, Greenlane, Panmure, and all surrounding suburbs.
- **Rodney & Hibiscus Coast** — Orewa, Silverdale, Whangaparaoa, Helensville, Kumeu, Millwater, Gulf Harbour, and all surrounding areas.

## Vehicle Makes & Models
Over 40,000 pieces of glass in stock covering virtually every make and model on NZ roads, including:
Toyota, Nissan, Mazda, Ford, Mitsubishi, Honda, Holden, Suzuki, Subaru, Hyundai, Volkswagen, Kia, BMW, Isuzu, Audi, Mercedes-Benz, Tesla, Range Rover, and 40+ more makes. Commercial vehicles, vans, utes, and excavator glass also available.

## Specialist Vehicles
- **Tesla Model 3 & Model Y** — OEM-quality glass with camera housing, full roof glass replacement.
- **Range Rover (all models)** — HUD-compatible windscreens, rain sensor & ADAS camera integration, heated windscreen replacements.

## Pricing (2025)
- **Insured vehicles:** Typically nil excess — you pay nothing. Windscreen excess if applicable: $100–$500.
- **Standard vehicle (private):** $650–$850 for basic windscreen replacement.
- **ADAS-equipped / European vehicle (private):** $800–$1,500+ depending on sensors, cameras, and calibration needs.
- **Tesla Model 3 / Y:** $1,000–$1,500+
- **Range Rover (HUD + heated + ADAS):** $1,200–$1,800+
- **Commercial van / ute windscreen:** $650–$950
- **Chip repair:** Often free under insurance; private $80–$150.
- **Mobile service:** No extra charge — same price whether at home, workplace, or roadside.

## Insurance
Direct billing with 36+ New Zealand insurance providers including: AA Insurance, AMI, AMP, ANDO, Aon, Autosure, Camper Care, China Insurance, Classic, Covi, FMG, Go Insurance, GT Insurance, IAG, IUA, JLT, Lantern, Lumley, Medical Assurance, Motor and General, NAC, National Auto Club, New India, NZI, Prestigio, Protecta, QBE, State Insurance, Swan, TLC, Tower, Trademe, and more.

## Key Facts
- Established: 1989 (37+ years in business)
- Glass inventory: 40,000+ pieces
- Google rating: 4.5 stars (46 reviews)
- Warranty: Lifetime quality warranty on all work for as long as you own the vehicle
- Response time: Same-day service available. Call before 2pm for best availability.
- Payment: Insurance direct billing preferred. Private quotes available on request.

## How to Book
Call 0800 757-985 or fill out the online glass enquiry form at https://aaaautoglass.co.nz/#contact. For urgent repairs, call directly for priority service.
